phases.label: Plotly Basics
phases.description: Interactive charts with Plotly Express and Graph Objects.

topics.label: Plotly Express
topics.description: px.scatter, px.line, px.bar, px.histogram. One-line interactive charts.

topics.label: Graph Objects
topics.description: go.Figure, go.Scatter, go.Bar for full control. Traces and layouts.

topics.label: Layouts & Styling
topics.description: Update axes, titles, legends, colors, and themes.

topics.label: Dash Integration
topics.description: Build web dashboards with Plotly Dash.
